description: The function combines two ordered grades streams.
The function returns a merged list of grades.
If grade 'a' is less than grade 'b', append 'a' to the merged list.
If grade 'b' is less than grade 'a', append 'b' to the merged list.

conditions: merged and left and right and (merged[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])
description: If the last elements of 'merged', 'left', and 'right' lists are equal, remove the last element from the merged list.

conditions: not merged or not left or not right or not (merged[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])
description: If the last elements of 'merged', 'left', and 'right' lists are not equal, do not remove the last element from the merged list.
The function uses a while loop to iterate over the 'left' and 'right' lists.
